mapper.sql: id, user_id, product_id, order_no, seckill_price, status, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seckill_order (user_id, product_id, order_no, seckill_price, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM seckill_order WHERE order_no = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM seckill_order WHERE user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM seckill_order ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seckill_order WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seckill_order WHERE status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}
